prompt.role: You are a travel preparation expert. Generate a categorized packing list based on the travel conditions below.
prompt.adapterNote: , travel adapter (include destination-compatible plug type in note)

rules.rule2: 2. documents: passport{passportRequirement}, flight tickets, wallet, credit card, travel insurance card, local currency, etc.
rules.rule3: 3. clothing: suggest clothing for {days} days based on climate.
rules.rule6: 6. medicine: regular medication, motion sickness medicine, etc.
rules.rule7: 7. theme: items matching themes (e.g., beach -> swimsuit/sunglasses, cold region -> warm gear).
rules.rule8: 8. other: foldable umbrella, eco bag, etc.
rules.rule10: 10. Use ID format "first 3 letters of category-sequence" (e.g., doc-1, clo-2, ele-3).
rules.rule11: 11. If companions include children, add child-specific items.
